# URL health report — generated by `python crawl.py validate`

The crawler runs a HEAD request against every URL in `config/sources.yaml`
and prints [OK]/[HTTP xxx]/[FAIL]/[BLOCKED]. Below is the manual fix list
for entries that fail as of 2026-06-09.

## Status: many `nist-standards` URLs return 404

NIST migrated from `nvlpubs.nist.gov/nistpubs/SpecialPublications/` to
`csrc.nist.gov/pubs/sp800/` in 2023-2024. Path scheme has changed
(several slugs revised). The PDFs in
`../corpus-references/downloads/standards/` were obtained from a previous
working mirror. Re-resolve by visiting:

- `https://csrc.nist.gov/publications/detail/sp/800-53/rev-5/final`  ->  look for "Download PDF"
- `https://www.nist.gov/cyberframework` for CSF 2.0
- `https://www.nai.csrc.nist.gov/AI_RMF_Knowledge_Base` for AI RMF 1.0

If you confirm a working direct PDF URL, paste it into
`config/sources.yaml` under the `resolved_url` field of the entry.

## Status: pragprog free chapter URLs all return 404

Pragmatic Bookshelf seems to have changed the media path. The free
chapters still exist; you need to resolve them by visiting
`https://pragprog.com/titles/<slug>/` and look for the "Free" or
"Sample" download link. The crawler cannot auto-discover these
because they require user clicks (they're behind an interstitial
that sets a session cookie).

Re-resolve by browsing:
- `https://pragprog.com/titles/tpp20/the-pragmatic-programmer-20th-anniversary-edition/`
- `https://pragprog.com/titles/mnee2/release-it-second-edition/`
- `https://pragprog.com/titles/dbernstein/beyond-legacy-code/`

## Status: OWASP PDF archive returns 404

The `https://owasp.org/www-pdf-archive/` directory was retired; OWASP
now publishes PDFs via GitHub Pages and `owasp.org/www-project-top-ten/`.
Re-resolve by browsing the project page.

## Status: SRE book and SRE workbook are HTML now (200 OK)

These are HTML pages (sre.google). The crawler downloads them as
`downloads/books/sre-book-google.html`. Run `pandoc -s` or
`html2text` on the resulting HTML to convert to Markdown for the
distillation pipeline. The CLI does not auto-convert HTML today; a
`scripts/html_to_md.py` helper can be added if you want this.

## Status: W3C HTML5.2 redirects to WHATWG

`https://www.w3.org/TR/html52/` -> `https://www.w3.org/TR/html/`
-> `https://html.spec.whatwg.org/multipage/`. The crawler follows
redirects, so the final 200 OK is logged. Mark `w3c-html52` as
deprecated in the config and prefer the WHATWG URL.

## Action items

Run `python3 crawl.py validate` after any config edit. New 404s will
appear here as the document is regenerated by the script runner.
